name: Pilot Grove Savings Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank serving Southeast Iowa since 1911, offering checking, savings, CDs, mobile banking, and lending services.
description_long: Pilot Grove Savings Bank is a traditional community bank that has operated in Southeast Iowa for over a century, establishing itself as a locally-rooted financial institution with deep regional ties. The bank emphasizes personal relationships and local decision-making, positioning itself as a customer-focused alternative to larger national banks by greeting customers by name and maintaining a local lending team. The institution offers a full suite of retail banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with competitive rates, mobile banking with mobile deposit functionality, online banking, and loan services. Their technology offerings include a mobile app with photo deposit capability, online banking enrollment, password reset services, and mobile check deposits to reduce customer trips to physical branches. What distinguishes Pilot Grove Savings Bank is its explicitly local focus—the tagline "Working for Southeast Iowa" and "Keep it Simple Southeast Iowa" reflects a community-banking model rather than national operations. The bank also provides investment services with a financial news section, though depth of investment offerings is not detailed on the website. Pilot Grove Savings Bank is appropriate for customers who prioritize personal relationships and local decision-making over digital-first banking, though the website content is relatively limited in detailing comprehensive product features, rates, terms, and fees. Community banks of this type typically offer competitive products but may have higher minimums and fewer digital features than larger institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Mobile deposit functionality available in mobile app to reduce branch visits
Offers competitive CD rates according to website
Online banking and password reset enrollment available
Full-service lending team available for loan consultations
Over 115 years of operating history in Southeast Iowa since 1911
Personal, relationship-based banking model with named customer service approach
cons: Limited digital information on website about specific rates, terms, fees, or account minimums
Geographic service area appears limited to Southeast Iowa, not serving broader regions
No clear information about product variety compared to larger regional or national banks
Website provides minimal details on loan products, eligibility, or lending terms
Investment services mentioned but not substantively detailed or explained

contact.address: 1341 Pilot Grove Rd, Pilot Grove, IA 52648

best_for: Southeast Iowa residents prioritizing community banking relationships over large national institutions
Customers valuing personal service and local lending decisions for mortgages or business loans
Savers seeking competitive CD rates with FDIC protection and local bank relationships
diagnosis: Pilot Grove Savings Bank is best for Southeast Iowa residents who value personal banking relationships and local decision-making over the convenience and feature-richness of digital-first or national banks. The primary caveat is limited geographic service area and minimal public information on the website regarding specific product features, rates, terms, and fees—interested customers should contact the bank directly for detailed offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 1341 Pilot Grove Rd, Pilot Grove, IA 52648
